label: 2018 — SOAK
text: At SOAK, a regional burn in Oregon, Julian encountered his first fire ceiling. The experience lodged itself somewhere deep.

label: 2018 — The First One
text: Within a month he had built his own inverted fire — strung up in a carport, then taken out to the Alvord Desert to celebrate his birthday. Julian also built a geodesic dome from reclaimed pallet wood. The dome dreams were already alive, though it would be several years before a more permanent steel dome would be built.

label: 2019 — The Dirty Marshmallow
text: A second version found its home in the Dirty Marshmallow — Julian's converted cargo van — mounted above the slide-out bed. It made the return trip to the Alvord Desert for another birthday.

label: The Steel Years
text: All the while, Julian was quietly collecting steel — from construction sites, from trampolines — holding a vision of a geodesic dome.

label: May 15, 2022 — AGNIS is Born
text: Fabrication complete, the dome was assembled for the first time. That vision became real, and AGNIS was born.

label: July 2022 — Samadhi Summer
text: AGNIS made its first appearance at Samadhi Summer.

label: August 2022 — Heart Expansion
text: The dome joins Heart Expansion in Duvall for the first time.

label: 2023 — Sh'bang
text: The dome made it to Sh'bang — Julian's first year at the event. AGNIS was borrowed by the festival that year.

label: 2023 — Samadhi Summer
text: Samadhi Summer at the Lookout Arts Quarry.

label: 2024 — Acro Campout
text: The first year AGNIS attended Acro Campout.

label: August 2024 — Heart Expansion
text: The dome rejoins Heart Expansion in Duvall.

label: 2024 — Sh'bang
text: AGNIS returns to Sh'bang for Labor Day weekend — and for the first time, the dome floats, lifted on pontoons Julian fabricated himself.

label: June 2025 — Birthday
text: A birthday celebration and the first test of a weather-resistant covering system, bringing AGNIS one step closer to being truly all-season.

label: 2025 — Acro Campout
text: AGNIS returns to Acro Campout for its second year.

label: 2025 — Sh'bang
text: AGNIS made the Sh'daily Chronicle. Under the headline "GET IN THE DOME": "You've heard whispers in the streets, and the rumors are true: King Julian is here and The Dome is back, too! The Dome is a magnificent metal structure, with sun-shades and hammocks hanging from its friendly geometric limbs. During the day, The Dome takes to the crystal waters of the Quarry as a floating paradise. In the evening, The Dome perches on the quarry's shores. The Dome is a place to curl up with friends and strangers (soon-to-be-friends) and relax, warmed by the ring of fire licking gently along The Dome's apex. Friendships forged in The Dome will last forever, according to Dome acolytes who experienced it last year."

label: 2025 — Lookout Arts Quarry
text: AGNIS floated at the Lookout Arts Quarry.

label: October 2025 — Private Wedding
text: AGNIS appeared at its first wedding.

label: June 2026 — Birthday
text: A new milestone: AGNIS floats for the first time on a floating trampoline, transforming it into a fully amphibious structure.
